title: Project Setup — Basic Output
description: Create a C++ program that prints a welcome message for the Student Grade Tracker. Display a sample student name and their grade using cout. This is the foundation — every future step builds on this.
test_code:
assert '#include <iostream>' in cpp, 'Must include <iostream> header'
assert 'cout' in cpp, 'Must use cout to display output'
assert 'main' in cpp, 'Must define a main function'
assert 'return 0' in cpp, 'main should return 0'
assert 'using namespace std' in cpp or 'std::cout' in cpp, 'Must use std namespace or std:: prefix'
assert cpp.count('cout') >= 2, 'Use cout at least twice — once for welcome message and once for student info'
acceptance_criteria: Uses cout to print a welcome message
Displays a sample student name and grade
hints: Start with: cout << "Welcome to the Student Grade Tracker!" << endl;
Display a student like: cout << "Student: Alice — Grade: 92" << endl;
Remember to use << endl or \n for line breaks
